# File Redirects

This file maps old archive locations to their new merged locations.

**Why files moved:**
- Duplicate detection merged archives containing identical .exe files
- Version-based organization moved files to version-specific directories

## How to Find Your File

1. Search this page (Ctrl+F) for the old filename
2. Use the [proggie-index.html](../proggie-index.html) search interface
3. Browse [proggie-index.md](../proggie-index.md) by version
